## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on article reviews and plan the next content batch.](https://fathom.video/share/xTXGcFiF9oxhXEmHUq-Qi-x3ZoLBKWHF?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Nathalie will implement Dhruv's minor revisions on 4 articles today, enabling immediate staging without a re-review.](https://fathom.video/share/xTXGcFiF9oxhXEmHUq-Qi-x3ZoLBKWHF?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [The team will proceed with staging the 4 revised articles and select the next batch from Nathalie's suggested list.](https://fathom.video/share/xTXGcFiF9oxhXEmHUq-Qi-x3ZoLBKWHF?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Aida will send an async update to Dhruv on the staging plan and the new article list.](https://fathom.video/share/xTXGcFiF9oxhXEmHUq-Qi-x3ZoLBKWHF?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)

## Topics

### Article Review & Staging

  - [Dhruv completed reviews for 4 articles, with 6 still pending.](https://fathom.video/share/xTXGcFiF9oxhXEmHUq-Qi-x3ZoLBKWHF?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Revisions are minor and prescriptive → Nathalie can implement them today, clearing the articles for immediate staging.](https://fathom.video/share/xTXGcFiF9oxhXEmHUq-Qi-x3ZoLBKWHF?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Aida will notify Dhruv of the staging plan and send Nathalie's suggested list for the next content batch.](https://fathom.video/share/xTXGcFiF9oxhXEmHUq-Qi-x3ZoLBKWHF?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)

### Team Transition

  - [The team will hold an internal meeting to discuss the transition plan.](https://fathom.video/share/xTXGcFiF9oxhXEmHUq-Qi-x3ZoLBKWHF?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Nathalie noted internal changes on her end, which will be discussed later.](https://fathom.video/share/xTXGcFiF9oxhXEmHUq-Qi-x3ZoLBKWHF?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Notify Dhruv of the staging plan for the 4 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/xTXGcFiF9oxhXEmHUq-Qi-x3ZoLBKWHF?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
